title: NZSMP
description: The required modpack for the NZSMP server. It contains all necessary mods, configs, emotes, and resource packs.
body:
In purgatory...

#### I:  7/11/24 - 7/4/25
#### II: 20/8/25 - 24/10/25
#### A:  14/4/26 - present

The NZSMP is a modpack assembled for a server of the same name (which you must be whitelisted on in order to join. If you have received a link to this pack, then you should already be whitelisted).

The main focus when designing the pack, and the accompanying server, was creating a fun and accessible vehicle for social interaction. The included mods offer a variety of content that the player is free to explore at their own pace. Since A1, the mod count has been greatly reduced to a very manageable and performant level.

This pack is for the client only. It should not be used to host a server, or even for singleplayer. The server's modlist is distinct and exclusive to the official server.

**Externally acquired mods:**
- [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked)
- [Mighty Mail](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mighty-mail)
- [Furniture Refurbished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)
- [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
- [ReTerraforged](https://github.com/racoonman2/ReTerraForged)
- [Farmers Respite Fabric](https://github.com/Adlumia7/Farmersrespite-Fabric) (a fork that fixes a crucial bug)
